## Financial Modeling & Capital Strategy for AI Co-Pilot Startup
QuantFi helped an early-stage AI startup sharpen its business model, optimize pricing, and build a capital raise narrative grounded in usage-based economics and investor-grade unit metrics.
<3 weeks
to build a full investor-grade model
QuantFi delivered a dynamic model with flexible assumptions on pricing, usage intensity, and infra costs—tailored for seed-stage investor conversations.
5+
capital raise scenarios modeled
From lean bootstrapped growth to aggressive GTM expansion, each raise scenario included runway, dilution, and milestone planning for board alignment.
Token-based
pricing structure adopted pre-launch
QuantFi’s hybrid pricing approach positioned the company to monetize both reliability (via subscriptions) and value delivery (via usage), with clear CFO-aligned messaging.
[Schedule a Consultation](https://www.quantfi.us/contact)
## 🧩 The Problem
QuantFi partnered with the founding team to design a scalable, capital-efficient business model, including:  

  * Defining the “problem-to-cash” pathway by mapping economic value to product usage.  

  * Developing a hybrid pricing structure (subscription + tokenized usage) to balance predictability with upside.  

  * Building an investor-ready financial model that captured CAC, margin by usage tier, LTV sensitivity to prompt frequency, and infra scaling costs.  

  * Supporting investor conversations with a clear ROI narrative and scenario-based valuation frameworks.


## 💡 QuantFi's Solution
QuantFi partnered with the founding team to design a scalable, capital-efficient business model, including:  

  * Defining the “problem-to-cash” pathway by mapping economic value to product usage.  

  * Developing a hybrid pricing structure (subscription + tokenized usage) to balance predictability with upside.  

  * Building an investor-ready financial model that captured CAC, margin by usage tier, LTV sensitivity to prompt frequency, and infra scaling costs.  

  * Supporting investor conversations with a clear ROI narrative and scenario-based valuation frameworks.


## 🚀 The Results
The startup entered its raise with a compelling financial story—rooted in real-world usage data and tied directly to GTM motions. Founders were able to position their pricing model as a strength, not a question mark, and engaged VCs with conviction on scalability, retention, and return on infrastructure.  

No items found.

Model to raise in 3 weeks  

Month-end close time to 3 days  

Due diligence completed  

Board reporting automated  

### Pricing Clarity Drives Profitability for D2C Wellness Brand
A detailed unit economics review enabled smarter pricing decisions, helping a fast-growing consumer brand boost margins, cut wasteful spend, and improve EBITDA within 90 days.
+15%
increase in gross margin on top-selling SKUs
-20%
reduction in spend on unprofitable customer segments
+20%
improvement in overall EBITDA margin within 90 days
[Read Case Study](https://www.quantfi.us/case-studies/pricing-clarity-drives-profitability-for-d2c-wellness-brand)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa0b6/6835eeafe2fe11d971eb8421_Round%20Object%20on%20Wood.jpg)
### Scenario-Driven Modeling Supports Complex PE Carve-Out
QuantFi partnered with a PE sponsor on a carve-out from a global financial institution, delivering scenario-driven modeling to optimize structure, quantify risk, and drive investment conviction.
15+
capital structure variations evaluated in real time
3
fully modeled operating scenarios supported investment committee approval
2
week turnaround from LOI to fully dilligenced model
[Read Case Study](https://www.quantfi.us/case-studies/scenario-driven-modeling-supports-complex-pe-carve-out)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa0b6/6835ed83bc0c6b46413c18c6_City%20High%20Rise%20Buildings.jpg)
### Full-Spectrum Sell-Side Support Yields Multiple LOIs in 90 Days
QuantFi prepared a Midwest industrial business for sale with investment-grade materials—delivering a full financial model, QOE support, and detailed CIM that drove a competitive M&A process.
3+
serious LOIs received within 90 days of outreach
+11%
Normalized EBITDA vs. management-reported
30+ page
CIM modeled after top-tier IB standards
[Read Case Study](https://www.quantfi.us/case-studies/full-spectrum-sell-side-support-yields-multiple-lois-in-90-days)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68227ab77271320729baa0b6/6835f11079d912047823c892_Businesswoman%20Presentation%20Unsplash.jpg)

### NetSuite Rollout Unlocks Cross-Border Visibility for CPG Brand
QuantFi led a NetSuite implementation for a high-growth CPG brand, enabling streamlined warehouse operations, real-time inventory tracking, and scalable cross-border workflows.
100%
SKU-level inventory visibility across both warehouses
3x
faster monthly close process
Zero
operational downtime during rollout
[Read Case Study](https://www.quantfi.us/case-studies/netsuite-rollout-unlocks-cross-border-visibility-for-cpg-brand)
